articles.title: Crude Oil Prices Rise as US-Iran Hostilities Continue
articles.description: August WTI crude oil (CLQ26 ) on Tuesday closed up +1.20 (+1.54%), and August RBOB gasoline (RBQ26 ) closed up +0.0610 (+1.93%). Crude oil and gasoline prices added to Monday’s gains on Tuesday, with crude posting a 1-month high and gasoline posting...

articles.title: Nat-Gas Prices Consolidate Above Monday’s 2-Month Low
articles.description: August Nymex natural gas (NGQ26 ) on Tuesday closed up +0.007 (+0.24%). Nat-gas prices settled slightly higher on Tuesday as they consolidated above Monday’s 2-month low. The outlook for cooler US temperatures is weighing on prices, as the cooler wea...

articles.title: Oil Tensions Surge as U.S. Reinforces Blockade
articles.description: Oil prices rose after the U.S. reinstated a naval blockade on Iran, impacting flows through the Strait of Hormuz. This geopolitical tension, combined with concerns about inflation and economic growth, affects global oil markets. Attacks between the U.S. and Iran continue, while market eyes await U.S. oil storage data.

articles.title: Rupee breaches 96-level to one-month low
articles.description: The rupee slipped past 96 per dollar amid renewed US-Iran tensions, rising oil prices, and stronger US Treasury yields, pressuring India's currency and economy while RBI intervenes to curb volatility.

articles.title: U.S. shares hold steadier
articles.description: Stocks are holding steadier Tuesday after a report showed U.S. inflation was not as bad last month as economists expected. That was even though oil prices continue to jump on worries that the United States and Iran may return to all-out war.

articles.title: U.S. shares hold steadier
articles.description: Stocks are holding steadier Tuesday after a report showed U.S. inflation was not as bad last month as economists expected. That was even though oil prices continue to jump on worries that the United States and Iran may return to all-out war.

articles.title: U.S. CPI slowdown lowers odds of July Fed hike
articles.description: Softer U.S. inflation reduced expectations for a July Fed rate hike, but rising oil prices could keep future increases on the table.

articles.title: US stocks hold steadier after inflation data, even as IBM plunges
articles.description: Stocks are holding steadier after a report showed U.S. inflation is getting less bad. Tuesday's gains came even though oil prices continue to jump on worries that the United States and Iran may return to all-out war. The S&P 500 rose 0.4%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average dipped 56 points and the Nasdaq composite gained 1.1%. Stocks got a lift from easing yields in the bond market, which fell following the better-than-expected inflation data. Chip stocks and other AI winners rebounded, while big U.S. banks reported stronger profits than expected. IBM was an outlier and fell sharply.

articles.title: Global Oil Prices Surge Amid U.S.-Iran Tensions
articles.description: Oil prices reached a one-month high after the U.S. reimposed a naval blockade on Iran, escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. This impacts global energy flow and raises inflation concerns. U.S. crude and Brent futures rose, despite inflation worries affecting demand. Oil inventories are under scrutiny.

articles.title: Rupee falls below 96 as crude oil prices go up
articles.description: The local currency touched a low of 96.24 to the dollar, its weakest level since May 22, before ending the session down 0.6% at 96.20
